1.name: The Creative
1.judgment: Great success through perseverance. The Creative works sublime success, furthering through perseverance.

2.name: The Receptive
2.judgment: The Receptive brings about sublime success, furthering through the perseverance of a mare.

3.name: Difficulty at the Beginning
3.judgment: Difficulty at the beginning works supreme success. Furthering through perseverance.

4.name: Youthful Folly
4.judgment: Youthful folly has success. The young fool seeks me.

5.name: Waiting
5.judgment: Waiting. If you are sincere, you will have success.

6.name: Conflict
6.judgment: Conflict. You are sincere but blocked. Be cautious.

7.name: The Army
7.judgment: The Army. Perseverance brings good fortune.

9.name: The Taming Power of the Small
9.judgment: Small Taming Power has success. Dense clouds, no rain.

10.name: Treading
10.judgment: Treading upon the tiger tail. It does not bite you. Success.

11.name: Peace
11.judgment: Peace. The small departs, the great approaches. Success.

12.name: Standstill
12.judgment: Standstill. Evil people do not further perseverance.

17.name: Following
17.judgment: Following has supreme success. No blame.

18.name: Work on Decay
18.judgment: Work on what has been spoiled. Supreme success.

19.name: Approach
19.judgment: Approach has supreme success. Perseverance furthers.

22.name: Grace
22.judgment: Grace has success. Small matters are favorable.

23.name: Splitting Apart
23.judgment: Splitting apart. Not favorable to go anywhere.

24.name: Return
24.judgment: Return. Success. Friends come without blame.

27.name: Nourishment
27.judgment: Nourishment. Pay attention to what you nourish.

29.name: The Abysmal Water
29.judgment: The Abysmal repeated. Sincerity brings success.

36.name: Darkening of the Light
36.judgment: Darkening of the Light. Be persevering in adversity.

37.name: The Family
37.judgment: The Family. The woman's perseverance furthers.

38.name: Opposition
38.judgment: Opposition. Small matters bring good fortune.

39.name: Obstruction
39.judgment: Obstruction. Southwest furthers. See the great person.

40.name: Deliverance
40.judgment: Deliverance. Southwest furthers. Act early if needed.

41.name: Decrease
41.judgment: Decrease with sincerity has supreme success.

42.name: Increase
42.judgment: Increase. It furthers to undertake something.

44.name: Coming to Meet
44.judgment: Coming to Meet. The maiden is powerful.

45.name: Gathering Together
45.judgment: Gathering Together. Success. See the great person.

48.name: The Well
48.judgment: The Well. The town changes but the well remains.

49.name: Revolution
49.judgment: Revolution. On your own day you are believed.

52.name: Keeping Still Mountain
52.judgment: Keeping Still. He feels no body. No blame.

53.name: Gradual Development
53.judgment: Development. The maiden is given in marriage.

54.name: The Marrying Maiden
54.judgment: The Marrying Maiden. Nothing that would further.

57.name: The Gentle Wind
57.judgment: The Gentle. Success through what is small.

61.name: Inner Truth
61.judgment: Inner Truth. Pigs and fishes. Good fortune.

62.name: Small Preponderance
62.judgment: Small Preponderance. Small things may be done.

63.name: After Completion
63.judgment: After Completion. Success in small matters.

64.name: Before Completion
64.judgment: Before Completion. Success if the fox does not wet its tail.
